SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI

Class GUIView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class GUIView extends View
This class is the GUI view of the game. It extends the abstract class View. It is used to handle the GUI of the game.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • GUIView

      public GUIView(ViewState state)
      Constructor of the class.
      Parameters:
      state - the state of the view.

  • Method Details

    • handleGame

      public boolean handleGame()
      This method is used to handle the game. It sets the GUI of the game and starts the GUI.
      Specified by:
      handleGame in class View
      Returns:
      false

    • resetAfterDisconnection

      public void resetAfterDisconnection()
      This method is used to reset the client model after after a game.

    • gameOver

      public boolean gameOver()
      This method is called when the game is over.
      Specified by:
      gameOver in class View
      Returns:
      false.

    • getLobbies

      public void getLobbies()
      This method is used to get the lobbies. It asks the virtual server to get the lobbies.

    • joinLobby

      public void joinLobby(int lobby, String nickname)
      This method is used to join a lobby. It asks the virtual server to join a lobby.
      Parameters:
      lobby - the lobby to join.
      nickname - the nickname of the player.

    • createLobby

      public void createLobby(String nickname, int numOfPlayers)
      This method is used to create a lobby. It asks the virtual server to create a lobby.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player.
      numOfPlayers - the number of players in the lobby.

    • chooseStartCard

      public void chooseStartCard(String selectedSide)
      This method is used to place the start card. It asks the virtual server to place the start card.
      Parameters:
      selectedSide - the side of the start card.

    • chooseToken

      public void chooseToken(Token token)
      This method is used to choose a token. It asks the virtual server to choose a token.
      Parameters:
      token - the chosen token.

    • choosePrivateObjective

      public void choosePrivateObjective(int id)
      This method is used to choose a private objective. It asks the virtual server to choose a private objective.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the private objective.

    • drawFromDeck

      public void drawFromDeck(String deck)
      This method is used to draw from a deck. It asks the virtual server to draw a card from the deck.
      Parameters:
      deck - the code of the deck from which we are drawing.

    • drawFromAvail

      public void drawFromAvail(int cardId)
      This method is used to draw from the available cards. It asks the virtual server to draw a card from the available cards.
      Parameters:
      cardId - the id of the card to draw.

    • placeCard

      public void placeCard(int cardId, String side, Position position)
      This method is used to place a card. It asks the virtual server to place a card.
      Parameters:
      cardId - the id of the card to place.
      side - the side of the card.
      position - the position of the card.

    • printError

      public void printError(String e)
      This method is used to print an error message. It sends the error message to the listener.
      Specified by:
      printError in class View
      Parameters:
      e - the error message.

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      This method is used to notify the player of a new event in the game.
      Parameters:
      evt - A PropertyChangeEvent object describing the event source and the property that has changed.
